ddls:
CREATE TABLE "lectures" (
  "lecture_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lecture */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subject of the lecture */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the lecture was held */,
  "topic" TEXT /* Topic covered in the lecture */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the faculty member who conducted the lecture */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the lecture */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the lecture */,
  "lecture_type" TEXT /* Type of lecture (e.g., theory, lab, seminar) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lecture_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lectures_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lectures_faculty_id FOREIGN KEY ("faculty_id") REFERENCES faculty ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "subject_name" TEXT /* Name of the subject */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the subject */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits for the subject */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for the subject (e.g., subject IDs) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faculty" (
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each faculty member */,
  "faculty_name" TEXT /* Full name of the faculty member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the faculty member */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department in which the faculty member works */,
  "designation" TEXT /* Designation of the faculty member (e.g., professor, assistant professor) */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise of the faculty member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major field of study of the student */,
  "gpa" REAL /* Current GPA of the student */,
  "batch" INTEGER /* Batch year of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "lecture_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lecture for which attendance is being recorded */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student whose attendance is being recorded */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the student (e.g., present, absent) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the attendance was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_lecture_id FOREIGN KEY ("lecture_id") REFERENCES lectures ("lecture_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "lecture_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lecture associated with the resource */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource (e.g., notes, slides) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the resource file */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_lecture_id FOREIGN KEY ("lecture_id") REFERENCES lectures ("lecture_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course material */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject associated with the material */,
  "material_type" TEXT /* Type of material (e.g., textbook, guideline) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the course material file */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the course material */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_materials_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "head_of_department" TEXT /* Name of the head of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, faculty, student) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "lecture_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lecture for which feedback is provided */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student providing the feedback */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the student */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the student (e.g., 1 to 5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_lecture_id FOREIGN KEY ("lecture_id") REFERENCES lectures ("lecture_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who is enrolled */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject in which the student is enrolled */,
  "semester" INTEGER /* Semester in which the student is enrolled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade */,
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enrollment for which the grade is recorded */,
  "grade" REAL /* Grade obtained by the student */,
  "grade_date" TEXT /* Date on which the grade was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_enrollment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrollment_id") REFERENCES enrollments ("enrollment_id")
)
